raw.subject: Your Liverpool page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed that every week, you share photos of happy dogs getting treats and playing together at Cory's Canine Cove. It's clear that you have a passion for providing a fun and safe environment for the furry friends in the community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be missing out on opportunities to connect with potential customers who are searching for local dog daycare services online.

I sketched out a rough idea of what a website for Cory's Canine Cove could look like, taking inspiration from your Facebook posts and photos. I imagined a homepage with a services overview, so people can get a quick sense of what you offer. I also included a photo gallery, so folks can get a feel for the fun and playfulness of the daycare.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/cory-s-canine-cove-liverpool

If you're interested in learning more about how a simple website could help you reach more pet owners in Liverpool, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Please reply or let's schedule a quick call to chat further about it.
